$comment: Configuration for classify-failures.mts — determines whether a failed merge queue run should be retried.

defaults.$comment: Jobs not matching any pattern are treated as this category.

alwaysRetryable.$comment: Jobs that are inherently flaky and should always be retried.

retryableOnTransientError.$comment: Jobs that are normally deterministic but can fail due to infrastructure issues. Retried only if error matches a transient pattern.

usuallyNotFlaky.$comment: Jobs that are usually deterministic and should not be retried unless we have strong evidence of a transient error.
transientErrorPatterns: Exceeded timeout of \d+ ms for a test

optional.$comment: Optional jobs that do not need retry.

transientErrorPatterns: Yarn is terminating due to an unexpected empty event loop
